speaker: speaker1
text: The Johnson are on their way back.You remember them , don't you ?

speaker: speaker1
text: We met them in Bermuda last May .

speaker: speaker1
text: The couple with the dogs , think back .

speaker: speaker2
text: No , I don't recall a thing about them .

speaker: speaker1
text: Well , I've invited them for brunch .

speaker: speaker2
text: Hmm , I must be getting absent-minded .
